<path>/home/user/code/nix-common.nix</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>44:   # Shared shell hook for both nix-shell and nix develop
45:   shellHook = ''
46:     # nix develop reconstructs PATH, losing HM session paths.
47:     # Restore them: devshell → HM → system
48: 
49:     # Source HM session vars and extract any PATH additions
50:     _pre_profile_path="$PATH"
51:     unset __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED
52:     . "$HOME/.profile" 2>/dev/null || true
53:     _hm_paths="''${PATH%:$_pre_profile_path}"
54:     [ "$_hm_paths" = "$PATH" ] && _hm_paths=""
55: 
56:     # Separate devshell from system using NIX_PROFILES (NixOS env var)
57:     # Non-NixOS: NIX_PROFILES is unset, everything stays in devshell, PATH unchanged
58:     _devshell_only=""
59:     _system_only=""
60:     _remaining="$_pre_profile_path"
61:     while [ -n "$_remaining" ]; do
62:       _e="''${_remaining%%:*}"
63:       [ "$_e" = "$_remaining" ] && _remaining="" || _remaining="''${_remaining#*:}"
64:       _is_sys=0
65:       for _p in $NIX_PROFILES; do
66:         case "$_e" in "$_p"/*) _is_sys=1; break ;; esac
67:       done
68:       if [ "$_is_sys" = 1 ]; then
69:         _system_only="$_system_only''${_system_only:+:}$_e"
70:       else
71:         _devshell_only="$_devshell_only''${_devshell_only:+:}$_e"
72:       fi
73:     done
74: 
75:     # Reconstruct: devshell → HM → system
76:     export PATH="$_devshell_only''${_hm_paths:+:$_hm_paths}''${_system_only:+:$_system_only}"
77:     unset _pre_profile_path _hm_paths _devshell_only _system_only _remaining _e _is_sys _p
78: 
79:     echo "Welcome to the development shell!"
80:   '';
81: }

(End of file - total 81 lines)
